allow: Bash(php -r "require 'vendor/autoload.php'; echo class_exists\('Intervention\\Image\\ImageManager'\) ? 'ImageManager OK' : 'MISSING'; echo PHP_EOL; echo class_exists\('Intervention\\Image\\Encoders\\WebpEncoder'\) ? 'WebpEncoder OK' : 'MISSING'; echo PHP_EOL; echo class_exists\('Intervention\\Image\\Drivers\\Gd\\Driver'\) ? 'GD Driver OK' : 'MISSING';")
Bash(php -r "echo extension_loaded\('imagick'\) ? 'Imagick: YES' : 'Imagick: NO'; echo PHP_EOL; echo extension_loaded\('gd'\) ? 'GD: YES' : 'GD: NO';")
Bash(php -r "echo php_ini_loaded_file\(\) . PHP_EOL; echo 'Extensions dir: ' . ini_get\('extension_dir'\) . PHP_EOL;")
Bash(php -r "echo 'upload_max_filesize: ' . ini_get\('upload_max_filesize'\) . PHP_EOL; echo 'post_max_size: ' . ini_get\('post_max_size'\) . PHP_EOL;")
